source_domain_family: Frenet-Serret frame / differential geometry of curves
source_domain_specifics: T tangent N normal B binormal
structure equations T' = κN, N' = -κT + τB
framing_text: Frenet-Serret frame attaches an orthonormal triple (T,N,B) to each point of a smooth space curve; curvature κ and torsion τ characterize the curve up to rigid motion.
